meaning: n.慰问者,安慰者,羊毛围巾
examples: He became Vivien Leigh's devoted friend and comforter.
And of course, you'll need a comforter and a pillow, too.
My comforter was reversible, red on one side, blue on the other.
There are hostas whose big, leathery leaves are quilted like a comforter and outlined with yellow or white edges.
She was more than just a mother, more than just a comforter.
